user_prompt: Predict and review 2026 World Cup matches every day.
inferred_goal: Build a manual prediction review workspace for preparing predictions, reviewing outcomes, and recording learning notes.

ai_team_preset.purpose: Check that supplied inputs are clear, sourced by the user, and usable for manual review.
Structure match questions and prepare prediction reasoning from user-provided context.
Flag missing odds context and avoid treating unsupplied odds as facts.
Combine the plan into a concise next action for user review.
Turn manual review notes into clearer future prompts and checks.

acceptance_checks: Static page works from file:// as local fixture content.
Match lists, odds context, and outcomes stay user-supplied.
Workspace content remains reviewable before any future implementation.
prototype_proves: A first user input can become a named workspace.
The workspace can receive a static AI team preset.
The first task plan can be reviewed before any implementation.
